segments.text: There's a major shift happening right now and young people are the most affected by it. Traditional marketing isn't evolving, it's losing relevance
and the numbers don't lie. The Edelman trust barometer shows 63% of consumers trust creators and experts more than
brands or CEOs. That's why attention has moved from billboards to Instagram,
YouTube, and short form video. Goldman Sachs estimates the creator economy will hit $480 billion by 2027. And that's
where Gen Creator School comes in. At Gen C, you don't learn content creation by watching slides. You learn it by creating 100 real videos. You'll be
mentored by people who've actually built careers with attention. Varun Maya, Aina Mayer, Lavina Kat, and creators who run
real channels and companies. Build attention as a career. Join Jensen's online creator boot camp. It's free. The link is in the pinned comment below.
